testcase.name: test_fee_math_and_kraken_not_whitelisted_refund

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected clear 'not whitelisted' error from backend (not a generic 500). status=500, body={"detail":"Bitcoin network error occurred. Your balance has been restored. Please try again later."} assert (False)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_11_btc_withdrawal_fees.py:246: in test_fee_math_and_kraken_not_whitelisted_refund assert clear_error and not generic_500, ( E AssertionError: Expected clear 'not whitelisted' error from backend (not a generic 500). status=500, body={"detail":"Bitcoin network error occurred. Your balance has been restored. Please try again later."} E assert (False)
